ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spa_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SPA document */,
  "clause" TEXT /* Clause number or identifier */,
  "expected_output" TEXT /* Expected output or title of the document */,
  "dest_file" TEXT /* Destination file or document identifier */,
  "dRD" TEXT /* DRD (Document Reference Designator) */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section or sub-section identifier */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., assurance plan, test report) */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Current status of the document (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was first uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the document was modified */,
  "compliance_standard" TEXT /* Industry standard or regulatory requirement the document complies with */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spa_documents_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "approval_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_approval_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_by_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the author belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author within the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the document */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES spa_documents ("doc_id")
)
